</div><div  class="elementor-button elementor-slide-button elementor-size-sm">Learn More</div></div></a></div><div class="elementor-repeater-item-03e8131 swiper-slide" role="group" aria-roledescription="slide"><div class="swiper-slide-bg" role="img" aria-label="Deadwood Tunnel with Sunflower_4.3"></div><div class="elementor-background-overlay"></div><a class="swiper-slide-inner" href="https://hbg.org/series/habitat-protecting-habitats-protects-life/"><div class="swiper-slide-contents"><div class="elementor-slide-heading">Exploring the delicate ecological balance</div><div class="elementor-slide-description"><h6>Protecting Habitats Protects Life</h6>
<p><i>Habitat</i> exhibit invites visitors to learn more about the importance of habitats to life, and what people can do to help preserve them.</div><div  class="elementor-button elementor-slide-button elementor-size-sm">Learn More</div></div></a></div><div class="elementor-repeater-item-89c1568 swiper-slide" role="group" aria-roledescription="slide"><div class="swiper-slide-bg" role="img" aria-label="Houston Botanical Garden - Houston, TX 042223"></div><div class="elementor-background-overlay"></div><div class="swiper-slide-inner" ><div class="swiper-slide-contents"><div class="elementor-slide-heading">Presenting a living museum</div><div class="elementor-slide-description"><h6>Beauty Grows here</h6>
<p>The Houston Botanic Garden features a collection of plants showcasing the region’s biodiversity, grown for educational, research, and display purposes.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="elementor-repeater-item-aa9fa61 swiper-slide" role="group" aria-roledescription="slide"><div class="swiper-slide-bg" role="img" aria-label="Houston Botanical Garden - Houston, TX 042223"></div><div class="elementor-background-overlay"></div><div class="swiper-slide-inner" ><div class="swiper-slide-contents"><div class="elementor-slide-heading">Connecting people with plants</div><div class="elementor-slide-description"><h6>Life grows here</h6>
<p>At the Houston Botanic Garden, visitors commune with nature, and each other, while engaging all of their senses in a serene oasis just minutes from the city’s center.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="elementor-repeater-item-91205e5 swiper-slide" role="group" aria-roledescription="slide"><div class="swiper-slide-bg" role="img" aria-label="Houston Botanical Garden - Houston, TX 042223"></div><div class="elementor-background-overlay"></div><div class="swiper-slide-inner" ><div class="swiper-slide-contents"><div class="elementor-slide-heading">Encouraging a sense of adventure</div><div class="elementor-slide-description"><h6>Discovery grows here</h6>
<p>Through a variety of educational programming and hands-on experiences, the Houston Botanic Garden sparks curiosity in visitors of all ages.</p></div></div></div></div><div class="elementor-repeater-item-185015a swiper-slide" role="group" aria-roledescription="slide"><div class="swiper-slide-bg" role="img" aria-label="Houston Botanical Garden - Houston, TX 042223"></div><div class="elementor-background-overlay"></div><div class="swiper-slide-inner" ><div class="swiper-slide-contents"><div class="elementor-slide-heading">Providing space for memory-making</div><div class="elementor-slide-description"><h6>Serenity grows here</h6>

        (function () {
            function runPixelCode( response ) {

                    return;

                    new Function( response.data.fb_pxl_code )();
                } catch ( e ) {
                    console && console.warn
                        && console.warn( 'Meta Pixel response parsing failed. Please check if your pixel is connected.', e );

            var radio = window.nfRadio
                || ( window.Backbone && window.Backbone.Radio );
            if ( radio && radio.channel ) {
                radio.channel( 'forms' ).on( 'submit:response', runPixelCode );
            }

            if ( window.jQuery ) {
                window.jQuery( document ).on(
                    'nfFormSubmitResponse',
                    function ( event, data ) {
                        if ( data && data.response ) {
                            runPixelCode( data.response );
                        }
                    }
                );
            }
